mnemonics.title: CRUD Operations
mnemonics.content: Create-Read-Update-Delete: Four essential linked list operations

mnemonics.title: HEAD Pointer
mnemonics.content: Hold HEAD tight! Losing it means losing entire list (memory leak)

acronyms.usage: Basic linked list with single direction traversal
Allows bidirectional traversal via next/prev pointers

visualTips.visualization: Imagine train cars: Each carriage (node) connected by couplers (pointers)
Picture scattered post-it notes (nodes) with addresses written on them

analogies.analogy: Treasure hunt where each clue points to next location (node)
Map starting point - lose it and you can't begin the journey
